{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe creating and setting values in a non-standard registry key HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider. This key is not a typical Windows component and could indicate persistence or configuration by an unusual or malicious service.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "reg_set",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider",
    "non-standard registry key"
  ]
}
